evals.prompt: Is the Tiny Startups backlink worth submitting for SEO?
evals.expected_output: Explains Tiny Startups offers a free DR50 dofollow backlink, which is solid mid-range. Compares with Open Launch (DR65), MicroLaunch (DR59), OpenHunts (DR50). Highlights the newsletter (17,500+ subscribers) as a unique differentiator most directories don't offer.

assertions.name: dr_value
assertions.description: States Tiny Startups has a DR50 dofollow backlink

assertions.name: comparison
assertions.description: Compares Tiny Startups backlink value with at least one other directory like Open Launch (DR65) or MicroLaunch (DR59)

assertions.name: newsletter_differentiator
assertions.description: Mentions the newsletter with 17,500+ subscribers as additional value beyond the backlink

evals.prompt: I built a bootstrapped SaaS making $3K MRR and want to get featured in the Tiny Startups newsletter
evals.expected_output: Explains the weekly human curation process by Jaisal Rathee. Recommends sharing MRR/revenue data, submitting an income report for credibility, offering a community deal, and engaging with @RatheeJaisal on X before submitting.

assertions.name: curation_process
assertions.description: Mentions weekly human curation by Jaisal Rathee

assertions.name: revenue_transparency
assertions.description: Recommends sharing revenue/MRR data or submitting an income report

assertions.name: engagement_strategy
assertions.description: Suggests engaging with Jaisal on X/Twitter or offering a community deal to increase feature chances

evals.prompt: How do I submit my product to Tiny Startups?
evals.expected_output: Walks through the Tally form submission process at tinystartups.com. Mentions preparing product name, description, screenshots, and founder story. Emphasizes the bootstrapped narrative and notes weekly curation means not every submission gets featured.

assertions.name: tally_form
assertions.description: Mentions submitting via Tally form at tinystartups.com

assertions.name: preparation
assertions.description: Lists what to prepare: product name, description, screenshots, and founder story

assertions.name: weekly_curation
assertions.description: Notes that curation is weekly and not every submission gets featured
